channel.title: Copley Family History

item.title: Roger Copley
item.description: Roger Copley of Roughley (1430–1490) Biographical Profile Born: 1430 Died: 1490 Location: Roughley (also Roughey), Surrey, England Title: Esquire Significance: Son of Sir Richard Copley; father of William Copley who established the Bredon Copley line; established Copley seat at Roughley, Surrey Fami...

item.title: RQ-M5-PHASE-2-FINDINGS
item.description: RQ-M5 Research: Phase 2 Findings Search Kinawley Parish, County Fermanagh Date: April 23, 2026 Researcher: Claude Code Question: Was Ann Munday actually Ann Murray? Critical Documentary Findings 1.

item.title: RQ-M1 Research — Lewis County Deed Records for Murray Family
item.description: RQ-M1 Research: Lewis County Deed Records (1825–1855) Research Question: Did the Murray family purchase land in the Cove Lick / Camden / Loveberry area of Lewis County, WV before 1843? Why This Matters: If Murrays purchased land prior to the 1843 Copley/Hoffman deed, it would establish that the Murr...

item.title: RQ-M5 Research — Tithe Applotment Books Search (Kinawley, Fermanagh)
item.description: RQ-M5 Research: Tithe Applotment Books Search Research Question: Was “Ann Munday” (wife of Michael Copley Sr., b. c.1823, Kinawley, Co.

item.title: Bredon Descent - Medieval Roots of the American Copleys
item.description: Bredon Descent: Medieval Roots of the American Copleys 📊 This page documents the earliest verified Copley ancestors and their descent to Captain John Copley, who emigrated to Ireland in 1657 — establishing the genealogical foundation for all American Copleys descended through that line.

item.title: Mermaid Diagram Usage Guide
item.description: Mermaid Diagram Usage Guide for AI Agents This guide helps AI agents add high-quality Mermaid diagrams to genealogical research pages.
